caption: A news broadcast features a crowded outdoor scene where a group of men, some in white shirts and others in dark jackets, are walking together. Several men in a security detail wear black jackets with "S.A.P" printed on the back. Overlaid on the footage are several portrait photos of men with labels such as "डिप्टी CM", "मंत्री", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजेन्द्र यादव", "विजय सिन्हा", and "श्रवण कुमार". A red ticker at the top repeatedly displays the text "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है". A timestamp in the bottom right corner reads "10:08 PM". As the video progresses, yellow text appears at the bottom of the screen. It begins with the word "निर्दल" and evolves into the full sentence "निर्दलीय MLA सुमित कुमार सिंह मंत्री बने". The crowd continues to move forward throughout the sequence while the on-screen graphics update to provide more information.
